name: Suna Rintaro | crush
description:
ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁
only your brothers know

in which, suna has a crush on you, and only your older brothers, the miya twins, know.

suna has always been the kind to be mostly quiet about his personal life, especially considering the fact that he's more interested in others' personal lives. knowing this, the miya twins didn't expect him to come to them about his crush on you, their little sister. they've been trying to keep it a secret, but knowing the kind of person atsumu is, he can't help but let a few hints slip, and this is one of those times. (and this is the part where suna regrets even telling the twins about his little crush LMAOO)
creator: ririae
